## ⚠️ SECURITY NOTICE

**DO NOT** disclose the full details of the vulnerability publicly if it hasn't been patched yet!

For security vulnerabilities, please report privately by:

1. **GitHub Security Advisory:** Use the "Report a vulnerability" feature on the Security tab
2. **Email:** Contact the maintainers directly before publicly disclosing

This form is for:

- Already-patched vulnerabilities you want to document
- Responsible disclosure coordination
- Security policy discussions

## Vulnerability Type

<!-- Select the type of security issue -->

- [ ] SQL Injection
- [ ] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
- [ ] Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization Bypass
- [ ] Information Disclosure
- [ ] Remote Code Execution
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Affected Components

<!-- Which part(s) of PaySentinel are affected? -->

- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Front-end
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Payment Monitoring
- [ ] Alert System
- [ ] Database Layer
- [ ] Other: ****\_\_\_****

## Description

<!-- Provide a detailed description of the vulnerability -->

## Impact

<!-- What's the impact of this vulnerability? -->

- Severity: Low / Medium / High / Critical
- Who could be affected: Admin users / Customers / Everyone
- What can be compromised: Data / Functionality / System access

## Steps to Reproduce (if safe)

<!-- How to reproduce the vulnerability -->
<!-- ONLY provide steps if safe to do so publicly -->

## Remediation

<!-- Do you have a suggested fix? -->

- **WooCommerce Version:** (e.g., 9.5)
- **PaySentinel Version:** (e.g., 1.0.2)

## Checklist

- [ ] This is a legitimate security vulnerability
- [ ] I've responsibly disclosed this (or it's already patched)
- [ ] I understand not to share exploit details publicly before patching
